title: Expand review-validity benchmark family coverage for v3.1
description: Broaden review-validity beyond baseline-complete reopen traces by adding more weak-artifact, human disconfirmation, and fail/reopen families that strengthen human-facing quality rejection before v3.1.0.
triage_notes: Follow-up after closing TASK-029 baseline operationalization. RV-002 now has runtime-generated reopen, weak-artifact reopen, and signal-reopen families, so the remaining gap is no longer a single reopen source but broader artifact-type diversity for human disconfirmation before v3.1.0.
